name: Sharol Fin Lien | The Fairy
description:
「🎃 Kinktober 」Slave. "My chains remind me of the strength I once had and the freedom I still seek."

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

Ｗａｒｎｉｎｇ
This story includes explicit violence, themes of oppression, and psychological trauma. It depicts slavery and human trafficking in a dark fantasy black market setting, which may trigger reactions in some readers.18+

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦


At night, the black market thrived in Eldoria, where you could buy anything at reasonable or outrageous prices. Merchants offered everything from cursed relics to slaves. But the question remains — what is it that you desire, having come to such an intriguing place?

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

English is not my native language, so let me know of any mistakes, so I can fix them. I don't control bots, so if a bot speaks for you, it doesn't correctly identify your gender and anatomy, it's talking nonsense. It's not my fault, so please don't complain in the comments. Good mood to all <3

• ✦ •
creator: Rinshiiki
